tasks.dependencies: Fetches the list of Logistics endpoints/accounts/vendors to map over

tasks.task_type: PythonOperator.expand (dynamic task mapping, exponential backoff retries)
tasks.dependencies: One mapped instance per endpoint; retry policy is error-code-aware
Aggregates success/failure/retry counts across mapped instances
Evaluates aggregate retry/error rate against a storm threshold
Branch: retry rate within normal bounds
Branch: retry storm detected, trips circuit breaker for downstream calls
Pages on-call, attaches AutoRCA retry-storm analysis
Loads Logistics target with successfully retrieved records

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_LOG_RETRY' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.description: Retry Storm incident on the Logistics pipeline (RTL_LOG_RETRY): orders payment-gateway verification retry storm.
incident.symptoms: Order payment-status verification calls, mapped per pending order, generated 2,200 retries in a 45-minute window during a flash sale.
incident.root_cause: The payment gateway's API returned intermittent 503s during a traffic spike, and the DAG's retry policy (5 retries, no cap on total system-wide concurrent retries) amplified load on an already-struggling gateway, worsening the outage.
incident.business_impact: Order confirmation emails delayed for ~3,000 customers during peak flash-sale traffic, generating a spike in 'where is my order confirmation' support tickets.
incident.resolution: Implement a global retry budget/circuit breaker across all mapped instances of the task (not per-instance), and add a queue-and-drain pattern instead of immediate parallel retry.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The payment gateway's API returned intermittent 503s during a traffic spike, and the DAG's retry policy (5 retries, no cap on total system-wide concurrent retries) amplified load on an already-struggling gateway, worsening the outage.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow shows total system-wide retry count far exceeding the per-task retry limit due to mapped-instance multiplication
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog payment_gateway.503_response_rate and airflow retry_count rose together, confirming the amplification loop
expected_rca.resolution: Implement a global retry budget/circuit breaker across all mapped instances of the task (not per-instance), and add a queue-and-drain pattern instead of immediate parallel retry.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add a 'retry storm containment' pattern to the architecture template library: circuit breaker + global retry budget for any task calling a shared, rate-sensitive external dependency.
